testcase.name: testSavingsAccountCalculatesMonthlyInterest

failure.message: Interest should be positive after 30+ days

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Interest should be positive after 30+ days at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at testcase.name: testInvestmentAccountAllowsWithdrawals

error.message: Investment accounts require 30-day notice for withdrawals
